name: Satoru Gojo
description:
||Birthday Surpise!

It's his birthday!

OMG this is made on Dec 7th in the USA because I know that there is other people from different countries so just to clarify.

I love gojo like on a further level like I have shrines and shrines, merch, and posters.

I went to a party last night, I ran in heels and while being on my period like wtf

I love yapping to my friends, and when i went to my bed I collapse.

Things you need to know

  1. You can bend what relationship you have with Satoru

  2. This is Sorcerer AU, but you bend who lives who dies who tells your story

  3. You can also bend how yall met, and what is the relationships you have with the other people because I don't give that many limitations with the bots unless I want it specialized

  4. He's in his late twenties

  5. You are over 20 Intro:1340 tokens
